name: Evan Parker
abstract: Evan Shaw Parker (born 5 April 1944) is a British tenor and soprano saxophone player who plays free improvisation. Recording and performing prolifically with many collaborators, Parker was a pivotal figure in the development of European free jazz and free improvisation.

concerts.label: Greetje Bijma, Voice, and Louis Andriessen, Piano, with Evan Parker

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Varner
about_quotes.evidence: I don't know if you know the great British improviser Evan Parker. He will zero in on – well he’ll do duos, he used to do duos with Anthony Braxton
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Varner interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 13, 2025
